title: Worker Hourly Earnings Growth Increases to a Record Level in August; Pace of Small Business Hiring Moderates
text: ROCHESTER, N.Y. , Aug. 30, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Workers of U.S. small businesses continue to benefit from higher wages, according to the latest Paychex | IHS Markit Small Business Employment Watch.

title: Martin Mucci of Paychex to Retire as CEO, Remains Chairman
text: ROCHESTER, N.Y.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Paychex, Inc., a leading provider of integrated human capital management software solutions for human resources, payroll, benefits, and insurance services, announced today that Martin Mucci, chief executive officer and chairman of the board, will retire as CEO, effective October 14th, 2022. Mucci will remain chairman of the company's board of directors. John B. Gibson, Jr., currently president and chief operating officer, will assume the role of president and C

title: Small Business Job Growth Slows in July; Hourly Earnings Growth Moderates Slightly
text: ROCHESTER, N.Y. , Aug. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Hiring at U.S. small businesses slowed for the fifth consecutive month, according to the latest Paychex | IHS Markit Small Business Employment Watch.
